summary: Candidate mode trigger thresholds now follow WORKFLOW-driven values for rework count, planner confidence, and require_clear_design_branches.
Legacy planning fallback now computes candidate_decision from the generated plan instead of always forcing primary-only execution.
Pipeline and Codex runner now propagate allow_thread_resume_same_run_only from workflow config into RunSpec.
Verification planning now includes fast-repair profiles and checks, and the pipeline persists repair_feedback plus split review artifacts.
Codex rollover now reads thread state via app-server thread/read and stores session snapshots in checkpoint and handoff artifacts.
Repository-defined verification passed: ruff format, ruff check, pyright, and full `uv run python -m pytest tests -q`.
